cases.title: Poor GDD with weak core loop and scope creep

expectedSamples.expected: Core loop is unclear.
Scope is too large for first playable.
Define the core run loop before adding meta systems.
Choose one primary fantasy and defer unrelated systems.
Requested features do not support immediate milestone validation.
Core loop is not validated yet.
Defer housing, pets, and fishing unless user confirms a vision change.
Validate combat loop first.
Failure states are missing.
Progression structure is missing.
Ask or propose how levels unlock.
Define puzzle completion and reset behavior.

cases.title: Average GDD requiring implementable technical design

expectedSamples.expected: Systems should be split into player movement, enemy contact, pickup scoring, timer, run state, and HUD.
Data model should distinguish authored tuning from runtime state.
Create Technical Design with component contracts.
Define first playable scene structure.

cases.title: Implemented feature with missing validation evidence

expectedSamples.expected: Feature should not be marked Validated.
Validation evidence is missing.
Route Play Mode validation to Input Agent.
Create ValidationEvidence linked to AC-Dash-001.

versionComparison.notes: Generate and retain future benchmark reports to enable regression comparison.

recommendations: Add seed datasets for missing categories: Production Planning, Unity Production, Project Management.
Run live agent outputs against each benchmark case and replace NotRun scores with evidence-backed scores.
Compare this report against the previous release before claiming capability improvement.
Feed benchmark regressions into the Production State Graph as risks or next actions.
